top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d_year,
    i_brand_id AS brand_id,
    i_brand AS brand,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sum_agg
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE 
    item.i_manufact_id = 128
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    d_year,
    i_brand,
    i_brand_id
ORDER BY 
    d_year,
    sum_agg DESC,
    brand_id
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    d_year,
    i_brand_id AS brand_id,
    i_brand AS brand,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sum_agg
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN

JOIN 
    item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk

GROUP BY 
    d_year,
